title: Floor Panel Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate how many floor panels and packs you need, including cutting waste.
metaTitle: Floor Panel Calculator - Estimate Panels and Packs
metaDescription: Use this floor panel calculator to estimate how many panels and packs you need based on room area, panel size, waste percentage, and pack coverage.
intro: Estimate how many floor panels to buy for your room. Enter the floor area, panel dimensions, waste allowance, and pack coverage to get a practical shopping estimate.
overview: This calculator helps you quickly work out the number of floor panels and packs needed for a flooring project. It uses the room area, panel width and length, waste percentage, and coverage per pack to estimate the total purchase amount with cutting waste included.
howItWorks: Enter the room area in square meters.
Add the panel width and length in centimeters.
Set the waste percentage for cuts and fitting.
Enter how many square meters one pack covers.
Get the required panel count, pack count, and total area with waste.
useCases: Planning laminate or vinyl flooring for a room.
Checking how many packs to buy before visiting a store.
Adding extra material for cuts, edges, and mistakes.
Comparing pack coverage between different flooring products.

examples.title: Example calculation
examples.input: Room area: 20 m2, panel size: 19 cm x 138 cm, waste: 8%, pack coverage: 2.2 m2
examples.output: The calculator estimates panels needed, packs needed, and total area with waste.
examples.description: Useful for estimating purchase quantities before ordering flooring.

examples.title: Buying floors with waste
examples.input: Room area: 35 m2, waste: 10%, pack coverage: 2.4 m2
examples.output: Shows the adjusted area and number of packs to purchase.
examples.description: Helps avoid running short during installation.

faq.question: How do I calculate how many floor panels I need?
faq.answer: Multiply the room area by the waste allowance, then divide by the area of one panel. This calculator does it automatically for you.

faq.question: Why should I add waste?
faq.answer: Waste covers trimming, fitting around edges, and possible mistakes during installation.

faq.question: What if pack coverage differs from panel size?
faq.answer: Use the pack coverage value from the product label. It accounts for the number of panels in the pack.

faq.question: Can I use this for laminate and vinyl panels?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as you know the panel dimensions and pack coverage.

seo.title: Floor Panel Calculator
seo.description: Estimate how many floor panels and packs you need, including cutting waste.
